name: localized_color_focus
description: Creates a region-proposal overlay and contrast-enhanced candidate zoom strip to support localized color inspection of salient accessories or clothing items.
applicability_conditions: Use when a direct-attribute question asks for the color of a visible object, accessory, or clothing item, especially when the target is small relative to the whole image or attached to a person. This is appropriate on raw images or prior artifacts when the next step needs region-focused visual inspection rather than global color averaging. It supports variations where the target may be handheld, worn, or adjacent to a person, and where multiple candidate local regions should be surfaced without assuming a fixed object class or position.
